arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with robot URDF/XACRO files. Usually the argument is not set, it enables use of a custom description.

arg.name: description_file
arg.description: URDF/XACRO description file with the robot.

arg.name: tf_prefix
arg.description: Prefix of the joint names, useful for multi-robot setup. If changed than also joint names in the controllers' configuration have to be updated.

arg.name: safety_limits
arg.description: Enables the safety limits controller if true.

arg.name: safety_pos_margin
arg.description: The margin to lower and upper limits in the safety controller.

arg.name: safety_k_position
arg.description: The gain for the position controller in the safety controller.

param.name: robot_description
param.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) $(find-pkg-share $(var description_package))/urdf/$(var description_file) ur_type:=$(var ur_type) name:=ur safety_limits:=$(var safety_limits) safety_pos_margin:=$(var safety_pos_margin) safety_k_position:=$(var safety_k_position) tf_prefix:=$(var tf_prefix)')
